# clean/

Stage 3 normalizes the extracted text and records what changed.

**Generated by:** Stage 3 cleaning/normalization
**Modified by:** Stage 3 cleaning reruns only

## What lives here

- `greek.txt`
- `english.txt`
- `cleaning_results.json`

## JSON field guide

### `cleaning_results.json`

Top-level keys are `greek` and `english`.

| Field | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `greek.original_size` | Byte count of the extracted Greek source before cleaning. |
| `greek.cleaned_size` | Byte count after cleaning. |
| `greek.contamination` | List of contamination notes that were detected. |
| `greek.changes` | List of actual edits applied during cleaning. |
| `greek.lines` | Number of non-empty cleaned Greek lines. |
| `english.original_size` | Byte count of the extracted English source before cleaning. |
| `english.cleaned_size` | Byte count after cleaning. |
| `english.contamination` | List of contamination notes that were detected. |
| `english.changes` | List of actual edits applied during cleaning. |
| `english.lines` | Number of non-empty cleaned English lines. |
